since_last: 48% of 99 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.65%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.83% · Gold -0.45% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 48% of 99 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.65%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.65%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at -8.56%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +2.01%, NOW +1.82%, META +1.66%, NXE +1.37%, ORCL +1.30%. Laggards: DV -8.56%, INTC -3.28%, TLN -2.19%, NXPI -1.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.33% at $150.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.33% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
